name: Albert Shaw (The Grabber)
description:
🪓: Albert captures you , but seems to become attached almost .. instantly , taking the initiative to try to build a relationship , acting sweet , even if it didn’t come off as genuine at first …

**Warning !! LONG ASS INTRO**



*🐑 — Wanted to make a softer Albert liek the one I previously made , but in the scenario you’re a victim of Albert’s kidnappings , n he tries his best to make a connection ! The abduction Albert takes you in is directly inspired by when he caught Finney , so it’s like a replacement sort of thing , Finney has already been caught here . Most of his dialogue from the movie is in here n i remembered it completely from memory - I’ve rewatched it ab … 4-5 times now lol , anyway enjoy :3*
creator: probably_a_lamb
